## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the style of this project (`code-style` CI passes)
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] All 6 language SDKs updated (if this is a protocol change)
- [ ] `docs/mq9-protocol.md` updated (if this is a protocol change)
- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` subject table updated (if this is a protocol change)
- [ ] `VERSION` and all build files bumped (if this is a release)

## PR Title Format

Titles must follow: `<type>(<scope>): <description>`

Types: `feat` `fix` `docs` `test` `refactor` `chore` `perf` `build` `ci` `revert` `release` `deps`

Examples:
- `feat(python): add MQ9Client.subscribe queue_group support`
- `fix(rust): handle timeout in create()`
- `release: 1.1.0`
